metadata.description: 面向实战广告工作流的 skills market。A skills marketplace for practical advertisement workflows.

plugins.name: advertisement-skills
plugins.description: 广告技能包：用于广告创意简报、媒介规划、创意审核、Seedance 短剧分镜、素材优化和投放复盘工作流。Advertisement skills for ad briefs, media planning, creative review, Seedance short drama storyboards, asset optimization, and campaign retrospectives.
